steps.title: Make the name essential
steps.content: The name Dennis Chambers identifies which American drummer the sentence is about. Because the name is necessary to identify the person, it is restrictive and should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Avoid appositive commas
steps.content: Choices A and D wrongly treat the name as extra information. Choice B leaves a comma after the name, interrupting the subject before may be best known. The answer is C.
